name: {{PROJECT_NAME}}
postCreateCommand: git config --global credential.helper '!f() { echo username=git; echo password=$GIT_TOKEN; }; f' && git config --global user.email "$GIT_USER_EMAIL" && git config --global user.name "$GIT_USER_NAME"; if [ -z "$(ls -A /workspace)" ]; then git clone ${GIT_BRANCH:+--branch $GIT_BRANCH} "https://${GIT_TOKEN}@$(echo $GIT_REPO | sed 's|https://||')" /workspace; fi; cd /workspace && { if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then uv sync; elif [ -f requirements.txt ]; then uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt; fi; } || echo 'devenv: dependency install failed — run uv sync in /workspace to see the error'
